name: current-2026-role-feature-residual-ridge
description: Exact 2026 test of using inferred role, defense, and foul-risk features only inside the residual-ridge correction layer.
modelNames: No-Future Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050
No-Future Residual-Ridge Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 RW=0.25 L=30 C=40
No-Future Residual-Ridge Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 RW=0.40 L=60 C=35
No-Future Role-Feature Residual-Ridge Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 RW=0.25 L=40 C=35
No-Future Strong Role-Feature Residual-Ridge Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 RW=0.40 L=60 C=35
notes: This is more conservative than direct role-scaled score injection: role and foul-risk features can only explain prior residual errors.
The residual correction remains no-future because it is fit from prior prediction errors only.
